summary: Add shard cache warm-on-start option for known-hot checkpoints
description: For checkpoints we know will be restored repeatedly in a short window, such as during active debugging of an incident, it would help to warm the shard cache proactively rather than waiting for the first restore to trigger it.

comments.author: Priya Natarajan
comments.body: Reasonable. I'll add a warmNow method on ShardCache in src/checkpoint/shardCache.ts that takes a manifest and pins every shard without going through a full restore.

comments.author: Owen Reyes
comments.body: would be nice to expose this through the CLI too, not just as a library method

comments.author: Priya Natarajan
comments.body: Added warmNow to ShardCache and a warm command to the CLI dispatch in src/cli/main.ts. Tested against a known checkpoint, subsequent restore skipped the fetch entirely for already-warmed shards. Resolving.

comments.author: Maya Okafor
comments.body: This will help a lot during incident debugging, thanks.
